mapper.select: SELECT kid, jwk_json, status, created_at FROM auth_signing_key ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT kid, jwk_json, status, created_at FROM auth_signing_key WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_signing_key (kid, jwk_json, status, created_at) VALUES (#{kid}, #{jwkJson}, #{status}, #{createdAt}) ON CONFLICT (kid) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_signing_key SET status = #{status} WHERE kid = #{kid}
